arts.ttl: Chelsea grant Cole Palmer request as Jadon Sancho left speechless before Everton clash
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has sent a clear warning to Everton ahead of Chelsea's Premier League trip to Goodison Park. Since then, Chelsea have beaten the likes of Brentford, Aston Villa and Tottenham which has placed them just two points behind Liverpool, the only team to have beaten them in league action, at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Chelsea team news: How has Maresca dealt with Cucurella ban?
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca names his Chelsea XI for Sunday's Premier League game at Everton, making a surprise decision regarding the replacement for Marc Cucurella.

arts.ttl: 'Able to lead': Chelsea loanee's manager says he's a 'great example' after just 26 senior games for club
arts.sum: 'We know he will be able to lead the team.'

arts.ttl: English duo likely to leave Chelsea in January
arts.sum: Two English players are reportedly set to leave Chelsea in the January transfer window, according to journalist Fabrizio Romano. arts.sum: Blues could spend Christmas Day top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: “My expectation…” – Fabrizio Romano makes early Chelsea January transfer prediction
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided a major Chelsea transfer news update ahead of January as he has made it clear he expects Cesare Casadei to leave Stamford Bridge. arts.ttl: Report: Why Michael Olise was against joining Chelsea before the club signed Cole Palmer
arts.sum: They've got on fine without him.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Christopher Nkunku 'attracting interest from five clubs'
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku is allegedly attracting interest from at least five clubs ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Chelsea can't wait to wave goodbye to their bogey ground Goodison Park - as they look to go top of the Premier League for the first time in three years against Everton
arts.sum: A meeting of sides at either ends of the table should be easy to call but Chelsea 's recent record on trips to Goodison Park make Sunday's match a toss-up.

arts.ttl: I regret leaving Chelsea to join Arsenal - I wanted to leave after three months
arts.sum: Willian has admitted that he wanted to leave Arsenal after just three months under Mikel Arteta. For me, it’s unfair to stay in a place that you don’t want to stay just because of the money.
